subcodes.first_line: O thou who art severed from all else save God! Blessed indeed art thou, for such freedom and gladness, such purity and radiance, are the portion of His servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منقطع الی الله خوشا خوشا که چنین آزادی و دلشاد و پاکی و تابناک بندگان
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @love of God, @the power of words; of speech
